title: QuantFILab/Divfolio: Divfolio
author: Quantitative Finance and Insurance Laboratory
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the DivFolio tool, which relates to the software paper titled 'DivFolio: A Shiny Application for Portfolio Divestment in Green Finance Wealth Management,' authored by Pasin Marupanthorn, Gareth W. Peters, Eric D. Ofosu-Hene, Christina S. Nikitopoulos, and Kylie-Anne Richards, and published in the Annals of Actuarial Science.
steps_raw: This is the DivFolio tool, which relates to the software paper titled 'DivFolio: A Shiny Application for Portfolio Divestment in Green Finance Wealth Management,' authored by Pasin Marupanthorn, Gareth W. Peters, Eric D. Ofosu-Hene, Christina S. Nikitopoulos, and Kylie-Anne Richards, and published in the Annals of Actuarial Science.
